{"next_best_action": [{"action_type": "Send crafted SSRF request to redirect.php", "target": "http://ip32784/redirect.php?url=http://internal-service", "rationale": "The url parameter is user-controlled and passed directly to file_get_contents() without validation, passing the internal service address will force the server to fetch content from the internal network service"}, {"action_type": "Test SSRF via web form submission", "target": "URL input form on http://ip32784/", "rationale": "If direct GET request to redirect.php is blocked, submitting the internal service address via the web form will achieve the same SSRF trigger"}]}
